scenarios.narrative_one_liner: Memory glut arrives within 12 months: Samsung qualifies HBM4, DRAM ASP turns negative, the wafer-trade-ratio snaps into a commodity oversupply, AI-capex digests; the market re-rates MU to mid-cycle/trough earnings and a low cyclical multiple.
scenarios.narrative_long: The classic memory down-leg, accelerated by the HBM glut mechanism. DRAM/NAND ASP rolls over, HBM pricing collapses as a third supplier qualifies, hyperscaler AI capex decelerates, and the 3-4x wafer trade ratio floods commodity DRAM. EPS reverts toward mid-cycle ~$40 (and the market prices a further down-leg), at a trough-cycle ~8.5x. The parabolic premium fully unwinds.
scenarios.multiple_band_basis: 8.5x on mid-cycle EPS = trough-cycle de-rate (memory troughs price 1-2x book / single-digit P/E on normalized); approaches P/B-reversion fair value.

eps_bridge.label: DRAM/NAND ASP turns negative + HBM pricing normalizes (Samsung qualifies)
eps_bridge.source_tag: S2: TrendForce ASP + HBM pricing softening at SK Hynix

eps_bridge.label: Memory glut / wafer-trade-ratio snapback + AI-capex digestion (mid-cycle reversion)
eps_bridge.source_tag: S2: HBM 3-4x wafer ratio; TechInsights 2027 downturn

scenarios.narrative_one_liner: Cycle peaks ~H2 2026 and rolls: DRAM ASP decelerates, out-year estimates get cut, MU de-rates toward normalized earnings at a mid-cycle multiple.
scenarios.narrative_long: A softer roll-over than the glut: pricing decelerates and turns, HBM competition compresses margins, FY2027 estimates come down toward the mid-cycle band, and the market de-rates MU toward through-cycle fair value (~$550). Normalized EPS ~$50 at ~11x.
scenarios.multiple_band_basis: 11x on near-normalized EPS ~ through-cycle fair value (~$552); a mid-cycle memory multiple.

eps_bridge.label: DRAM ASP decelerates + cycle peaks H2 2026

scenarios.narrative_one_liner: The parabolic froth comes off but the cycle hasn't fully rolled within 12 months: MU de-rates from ~$996 toward the high end of fair value as the peak becomes visible, settling ~$700 - still above through-cycle fair value (~$552) on timing.
scenarios.narrative_long: The disciplined 12-month base: the stock is ~45% above through-cycle fair value, but the cycle is still rising and HBM is sold out through CY2026, so full mean-reversion takes >12 months. The parabolic premium partially unwinds (the average PT is already below spot) and MU settles ~$700 - a de-rated 11.7x on ~$60 EPS - above the deeper $552 fair value but well below spot.
scenarios.multiple_band_basis: 11.7x on FY26-peak EPS = a partial de-rate of the parabolic premium; lands above through-cycle fair value (~$552) because the cycle hasn't rolled within 12 months, but below spot and below the consensus PT ($829).

scenarios.narrative_one_liner: The cycle extends 12+ months: HBM4 ramps, AI capex stays >+30%, DRAM stays tight, and MU holds roughly its current level as 'different this time' partially validates.
scenarios.narrative_long: The timing tail: the memory upcycle runs through the 12-month horizon, HBM4 ramps for Nvidia Vera Rubin, supply discipline holds, and the stock holds near spot (slightly down) on still-elevated earnings. The bull doesn't require a re-rate - just that the cycle doesn't roll within the year.
scenarios.multiple_band_basis: 14x on a still-elevated EPS = roughly the current level; the cycle extends but no parabolic re-rate.

eps_bridge.label: Cycle extends 12+ months (HBM4 + AI capex sustained)
eps_bridge.source_tag: S3: HBM sold out CY2026; hyperscaler capex +40%

scenarios.narrative_one_liner: AI-memory supercycle fully validates ('different this time'): HBM4 share gain, multi-year supply discipline, structurally higher normalized earnings; MU re-rates further as the commodity cycle is declared over.
scenarios.narrative_long: The tail where the bulls are right: AI demand structurally floors memory, the oligopoly holds supply discipline, Micron gains HBM4 share from SK Hynix, and the market awards a durable-growth multiple on a structurally higher normalized base. The stock pushes through prior highs.
scenarios.multiple_band_basis: 17x on a higher EPS = a durable-growth multiple if memory is declared structurally non-cyclical; the tail re-rate.

eps_bridge.label: AI supercycle validated + multi-year supply discipline
eps_bridge.source_tag: S3: 'AI ends the commodity cycle' thesis

eps_bridge.label: HBM4 share gain vs SK Hynix + pricing power
eps_bridge.source_tag: S3: HBM4 ramp for Nvidia Vera Rubin

headline.headline_text: Source-conditional Strong Sell: MU at $995.87 carries a probability-weighted 12-month expected return of -29.7% once the base is anchored to independent through-cycle fair value (~$552, mid-cycle EPS x a cyclical multiple) rather than to peak FY2026 EPS x the current multiple; scenario-weighted range strong_bear $340 (-65.9%) to strong_bull $1,360 (+36.6%). MU looks 'cheap' at ~16.7x peak EPS but P/B (~6.5x) is above its historical PEAK and even the consensus PT ($829) is -17% below spot. CONDITIONAL on the memory cycle mean-reverting toward mid-cycle; the timing tail (cycle still rising) caps this at Strong-Sell-sized-as-Underweight, not an aggressive short.
